items.title: Why Investors Are Watching Marqeta (MQ) After Recent Leadership Changes
items.description: Marqeta Inc. (NASDAQ:MQ) is one of the best tech stocks under $10 to invest in. On September 9, Sanjay Sakhrani, an analyst at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods (KBW), reiterated his Hold rating on the stock, maintaining his price target of $6.50 intact. This update followed Marqeta’s announcement of its CEO appointment on September 8. The company […]
